items.title: Silver resumes its slide, plunging 12%, after short-lived rebound
items.description: Silver prices slid as much as 16% on Thursday, snapping a two-day rebound as investors continued to unwind positions.

items.title: How The Story Behind Mitie Group (LSE:MTO) Is Shifting With New Growth And Valuation Views
items.description: Why Mitie Group’s Fair Value Just Got Tweaked Mitie Group’s fair value has just been nudged higher from £1.92 to £1.96 per share, with a slightly lower discount rate of 7.61% and a higher revenue growth assumption of 7.05% now feeding into analysts’ models. That small £0.04 move might not look huge on its own, but it reflects updated thinking around how the company could grow its top line in the coming years, taking into account the latest acquisition and expectations for steady organic...

items.title: Why Oklo Stock Crashed Today
items.description: Uranium prices are rising. Is that bad news for Oklo stock?

items.title: Outstanding Financial Professional Support Recognized: 2025 DALBAR Service Awardees Announced
items.description: DALBAR, the leading auditor of the customer service experience within the financial services industry, is pleased to reveal the esteemed recipients of the 2025 DALBAR Financial Intermediary Service Award. This renowned award recognizes organizations that have demonstrated dedication to providing exceptional customer service support to financial professionals throughout the year. This year's distinguished honorees are:
